name: studio.get_staging_info
description: Read information about an Actium Studio site's staging environment: URL, last-synced timestamp, drift indicator vs production.
whenToUse: Pre-flight before studio.promote_staging — verify staging is current and reflects the intended state.
Diagnostic: answer 'what does staging look like right now' for an operator reviewing unpublished work.
Drift check: identify whether staging has diverged significantly from production, flagging a need for a fresh sync.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants production analytics or page content — use studio.get_site or studio.get_page; staging info is environment-only.
Caller wants to trigger the sync itself — this skill only reads; a staging-sync action is a separate operation.
Site has no staging environment enabled on its plan — the has_staging flag will be false and other fields may be absent.
